pr_text:
## Title: Fix buffer overflow in NSSAI parsing loop

### Summary
The `parse_allowed_nssai` function in the NAS UE message parser extracts NSSAI (Network Slice Selection Assistance Information) entries from a network message into a fixed-size array of 8 elements. The while loop condition only verified that the buffer pointer remained within bounds but failed to check the array index, allowing potential writes beyond the allocated `nssaiList[8]` array if the message contained more than 8 NSSAI ent
